uplink.description: Full Davis weather record: mild conditions, light wind from south, light rain
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input. expected.data authored from this module's normalization; wire decode cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (pressure 1013.21 hPa, temp 21.11 C, wind 4.47 m/s @180 deg, rain rate 1.0 mm/h, day rain 2.4 mm).

uplink.description: Full Davis weather record: cold, strong wind near north, heavy rain
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input exercising sub-zero temperature (28.0 F -> -2.22 C via sign extension) and direction near 360. Wire decode cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Minimal Davis weather frame (truncated after day-rain): calm, dry, high UV
uplink._note: Synthetic shortest valid frame (21 bytes, through the day-rain high byte). dayET/soil/leaf/forecast/bar fields are absent so the codec omits those extras; upstream reads them out of bounds and emits 0/NaN, which we deliberately do not. Wire decode of the present fields cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic. 0x99 is not a recognized MCF88 uplink id; upstream returns null -> 'Error on decoding payload'.

uplink.description: 0x0b report-data but PM sub-type (0x2/0x01), not the Davis weather frame
uplink._note: Synthetic. report-type 0x2 sub-type 0x01 routes to particulate-matter parsing upstream, not weather.

uplink.description: 0x0b/0x2/0x00 weather frame truncated before the wind/rain block
uplink._note: Synthetic. Correct frame routing but too few bytes to read through day-rain; upstream reads out of bounds instead of erroring.
